check_item: Verify all safety interlocks — flame failure | high pressure | low water
acceptance_criteria: All interlocks functional — tested with simulation
corrective_action: Remove all bypasses — document and sign off

check_item: Check air system — FD/ID/PA fan rotation and vibration
typical_issue: Reverse rotation due to phase error
corrective_action: Swap any two phases at motor terminal

check_item: Hydro test completion — verify no leaks at design pressure
acceptance_criteria: Hold 1.5x design pressure for 30 min — no drop

check_item: Refractory curing — verify temperature profile during dryout
acceptance_criteria: Follow OEM dryout curve — max 50°C/hr rise rate
corrective_action: Re-cure affected area — follow controlled heat-up

check_item: Chemical cleaning of boiler — alkali boil out + acid clean
acceptance_criteria: pH and iron levels within limits post-clean

check_item: DCS loop checking — all I/O signals verified
acceptance_criteria: 100% loops checked — signal matches field device
typical_issue: Signal mismatch — wrong range or tag

check_item: Bed material charging and initial heating
acceptance_criteria: Bed temperature uniform — no hot spots > 50°C variance
corrective_action: Redistribute bed material — check air distribution

check_item: Coal feeding initiation — verify feed rate and distribution
acceptance_criteria: Feed rate matches design — all feeders operational
Efficiency ≥ 86% on GCV basis per ASME PTC 4
typical_issue: Low efficiency — high unburnt in ash
corrective_action: Adjust bed depth and air distribution

check_item: Emission compliance — NOx and SOx measurement
acceptance_criteria: NOx < 100 mg/Nm3 | SOx < 200 mg/Nm3 at 6% O2
typical_issue: High NOx — bed temp too high
corrective_action: Reduce bed temperature — increase staged air

check_item: TF fluid charging and circulation test
acceptance_criteria: No air locks — flow rate per design — no leaks
corrective_action: Vent at highest points during circulation

check_item: Fluid temperature ramp — verify 50°C/hr max rate
acceptance_criteria: Temperature rise controlled — no fluid degradation
typical_issue: Flash point concern at high temp
corrective_action: Check fluid quality — replace if degraded

check_item: Gas path integrity — check dampers and expansion joints
acceptance_criteria: No gas leaks — damper operation smooth
typical_issue: Damper binding due to thermal growth

check_item: GT synchronization — verify WHRB response to GT load changes
acceptance_criteria: Steam parameters stable within ±5% during GT load swing
typical_issue: Drum level fluctuation on GT load change

check_item: Slurry system commissioning — limestone prep and recirculation
acceptance_criteria: Slurry concentration 25% ± 2% — pump flow per design
corrective_action: Adjust minimum level setpoint — check NPSH
